title: Opening for Software Engineer at Narayana Health Digital

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Narayana Health Digital
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
